hypothesis: The first ten seconds of true quarter-hour openings contain an order-imbalance signal not recoverable from completed 15-minute OHLCV. Its public-state component should forecast 4-12 hour returns, while the raw first-30-minute path may partially reverse.
source: official Binance Vision USD-M monthly aggTrades with adjacent SHA-256 verification

event_definition.order_imbalance: signed taker quantity divided by total quantity in opening window

planned_independent_paths: standalone extreme opening imbalance with 30-minute delayed entry and 4/8/12-hour exits
public-state projection of opening imbalance using only lagged OHLCV/order-flow features
E1 consensus plus contemporaneous opening-imbalance agreement
SMC external-liquidity sweep plus opening-imbalance exhaustion reversal

execution_controls.decision_available: after the first ten-second opening window closes
execution_controls.earliest_entry: first transaction or executable quote strictly after boundary+10 seconds

forbidden: using the opening window before it completes
using future returns to choose event thresholds
treating paper regression coefficients as executable returns without a new local replay
